moments.title: World Cup 2026 Group Stages Heating Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, is well underway, with group stage matches dominating the football world.

angles.name: Daily Match Chat
angles.copy: Morning! Who watched the World Cup last night? Any shock results or standout performances you’re still talking about? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: With the World Cup well underway, how are our home nations performing? Keeping an eye on the Welsh dragons as they battle it out! #Cymru #WorldCup

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off Monday
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 begin on Monday, June 29, promising two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Anticipation Build-up
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon starts Monday and we're already buzzing for the first serves. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Tennis Talk
angles.copy: Just two days until Wimbledon! That iconic green grass, the tension, the drama... what are you most looking forward to this year?

moments.title: Glastonbury 2026 Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival 2026 concludes today, leaving a trail of unforgettable performances and festival fever across the UK.

angles.name: Festival Highlights
angles.copy: It's been another epic Glastonbury! What was your favourite moment, set, or surprise guest from Worthy Farm this year?

angles.name: Post-Glasto Blues
angles.copy: The fields of Glastonbury are emptying, but the memories will last a lifetime. Who's already planning their return to the Pyramid Stage?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Concert Series Underway
moments.blurb: The British Summer Time Hyde Park concert series is bringing a host of world-class artists to London's iconic park this week and next.

angles.name: London Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing! The BST concert series is delivering huge acts this week. Who are you hoping to catch?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're in London this weekend, BST Hyde Park has some incredible music lined up. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues to Deliver Drama
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1, is well into its run, with new bombshells and blossoming relationships keeping viewers glued to their screens nightly.

angles.name: Morning Debrief
angles.copy: Did you watch Love Island last night? We need to talk about that recoupling! What just happened?!

angles.name: Who's Your Favourite?
angles.copy: Halfway through the week, who are your favourite Islanders right now? Are any couples actually going to last?

moments.title: Shirley Manson Turns 60
moments.blurb: Shirley Manson, the iconic Scottish lead singer of the alternative rock band Garbage, celebrates her 60th birthday today.

angles.name: Garbage Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Shirley Manson! Her voice and style defined an era with Garbage. What's your favourite Garbage track?

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 60th to the one and only Shirley Manson! Still rocking it with Garbage after all these years. Legend!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Nicole Scherzinger, known for fronting The Pussycat Dolls and her successful solo career, turns 48 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls Star
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Nicole Scherzinger is 48 on Monday. What's your ultimate Pussycat Dolls anthem?

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: From 'Don't Cha' to 'Right There', Nicole Scherzinger has given us so many hits. Wishing her a fabulous 48th on Monday!

moments.title: Colin Hay Turns 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive Scottish-Australian singer-songwriter and frontman of Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Men at Work Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the brilliant Colin Hay of Men at Work on Monday! What's your favourite track from the Aussie legends?

angles.name: Down Under Voice
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of us celebrating Colin Hay's 73rd birthday on Monday! An iconic voice from the 80s. #MenAtWork

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Work It'! Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite track or music video from the legend?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: A huge happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott this Wednesday! Her impact on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave pioneers Blondie, will celebrate her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the utterly timeless Debbie Harry on Wednesday! Still rocking, still inspiring. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: New Wave Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 81st to the one and only Debbie Harry this Wednesday! A true music and fashion legend.

moments.title: Lindsay Lohan's 40th Birthday
moments.blurb: Actress and occasional singer Lindsay Lohan, known for films like 'Mean Girls' and 'The Parent Trap', celebrates her 40th birthday on Thursday, July 2.

angles.name: Noughties Icon
angles.copy: She's 40 on Thursday! Happy Birthday to Lindsay Lohan, a true noughties icon. What's your favourite Lindsay Lohan moment?

angles.name: Remember Her Music?
angles.copy: Before the Netflix rom-coms, Lindsay Lohan gave us some absolute bops! Wishing her a happy 40th this Thursday. #MeanGirls #Noughties

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: Chart-topping artist Post Malone, known for his genre-blending hits, celebrates his 31st birthday on Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Current Hitmaker
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the 'Sunflower' hitmaker?

angles.name: Birthday Weekend
angles.copy: It's a birthday weekend for Post Malone, turning 31 on Saturday! Time to crank up his biggest hits. What are you listening to?

moments.title: Huey Lewis's 76th Birthday
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, the charismatic frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square when you're turning 76! Happy Birthday to Huey Lewis this Sunday! What's your favourite track from the News?

angles.name: Back To The Future
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday! His music is simply 'The Power of Love'.

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! The one and only Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday next Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr next Tuesday! A true drumming icon. #TheBeatles

moments.title: Scottish Schools Break for Summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across Scotland are breaking up for the summer holidays this week, marking the start of weeks of freedom for students.

angles.name: Freedom for Kids
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many Scottish schools! What are your plans to keep the kids entertained?

angles.name: Road Trip Time
angles.copy: With Scottish schools breaking up, the roads might be getting busier! Where are you heading for your summer getaway?
